mapper.select:
select
customer.name as groupField,
user.name as groupField,
people.name as groupField,
goods.name as groupField,
goods.name as productName, COALESCE(sell_info.attr, '') as attribute, warehouse.name as warehouse, goods.unit as unit, sell_info.price as salesPrice, sell_info.nums as salesCount, sell_info.total as salesTotalPrice, sre_info.price as returnPrice, sre_info.nums as returnCount, sre_info.total as returnTotalPrice from goods left join sell_info on goods.id = sell_info.goods left join sell on sell.id = sell_info.pid left join warehouse on sell_info.warehouse = warehouse.id left join sre on sre.source = sell.id left join sre_info on sre_info.pid = sre.id left join customer on customer.id = sell.customer left join people on people.id = sell.people left join user on user.id = sell.user
AND goods.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.productName}, '%')
AND sell_info.warehouse = #{query.warehouseId}
AND sell.time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{query.startDate})
AND sell.time <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{query.endDate})
AND sell.customer = #{query.customerId}
AND sell.user = #{query.userId}
AND sell.people = #{query.peopleId}
ORDER BY groupField DESC
ORDER BY goods.name DESC
